Enumeration Case# MBUF_CSUM_REQ_TCPIPV6


## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1644524-anonymous/mbuf_csum_req_tcpipv6#discussion)

Indicates the TCP checksum for IPv6 has not been calculated yet.
